creator: radicleparticles@gmail.com
text:
After going through multiple PCIe SATA/eSata cards, and a motherboard BIOS update (which really shouldn't have had any affect) - the large scale copy from one external SATA drive to another finally succeded (again) without any ahcich errors. Inexplicable. Removing and reinserting original PCIe card intially didn't help. Detaching and reataching original cables didn't help. One thing different was using compressed air to try to clean the PCIe slot, but that is hard to qualify.

At this point in time, this problem report can be closed.
